title: Entrance Antiphon LR39
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: All the earth shall bow down before you, O God, and shall sing to you, shall sing to your name, O Most High.

title: Psalm 40
author: Francesca LaRosa
snippet: Here am I, Lord; I come to do your will.

title: John 1:14a
author: SP2026
snippet: The Word of God became flesh and dwell among us. To those who accepted him, he gave power to become children of God.

title: Holy Spirit
author: Ken Canedo
snippet: Holy Spirit, come into our lives. Holy Spirit, make us truly wise.

title: Entrance Antiphon LR40
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: You have prepared a table before me, and how precious is the chalice that quenches my thirst.

title: Here at This Table
author: Jant Sullivan Whitaker / Max Whitaker
snippet: Come and be filled here at this table. Food for all who hunger and drink for all who thirst. Drink of his love, wine of salvation. You shall live forever in Jesus Christ the Lord.

title: Like a Child Rests
author: Christopher Walker
snippet: Like a child rests in its mother's arms, so will I rest in you.

title: Blessed Be Your Name
author: Matt Redman / Beth Redman
snippet: Blessed be Your name In the land that is plentiful Where Your streams of abundance flow Blessed be Your name

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
